title: desmodium spirale var. bigelovii
intro: Desmodium spirale var. bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's tick trefoil, is a plant species within the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Desmodium spirale var. bigelovii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
